name: basic-engineering
description: Engineering toolkit — 40 composable skills, 7 agents, 15 rules, 7 hooks. Three orchestrators: SDLC (8 stages), ship-n-check (6 stages), AI-DLC (8 phases — adaptive intent-to-production lifecycle). Framework stacks: NestJS, Next.js, Django. Mode switching (dev/research/review). Daily summary, review learning, context budget, strategic compaction, continuous learning, autonomous loops. Language-specific rules for TypeScript, Python, Go. Always-on git conventions. Git safety and quality hooks.
